description_long: This object is a pair of eyeglass frames with a distinctive, thick, rectangular design. The frame appears to be crafted from a wood-like material, giving it a natural, textured appearance with visible grain patterns. The front of the frame features four prominent, round metallic rivets at the outer corners, adding both structural reinforcement and a decorative accent. The bridge is wide and solid, seamlessly connecting the two large lens openings. The temples (arms) are not visible, suggesting the asset is focused on the front frame only. The overall style is bold and retro, suitable for making a fashion statement in an urban environment.
description: A thick, rectangular pair of eyeglass frames with a wood-like texture and metallic rivet accents, exuding a bold, retro style.
description_view_0: Front view showing the full rectangular frame, wood grain texture, and four metallic rivets at the corners.
description_view_1: Angled front-left view highlighting the frame's thickness and the placement of the metallic rivets.
description_view_2: Angled front-right view emphasizing the depth of the frame and the smooth, continuous bridge.
description_view_3: Rear-left view showing the inner surface of the frame and the absence of temples.
attribute_frame_design: Rectangular, thick, full-rim frame with bold geometric lines and four round rivet accents at the outer corners. The frame is solid and robust, with a wide bridge and no visible temples.
attribute_lens_tint: No lenses are present; the openings are empty and fully transparent.
attribute_bridge_style: Wide, solid bridge with a straight, continuous design connecting the two lens openings seamlessly.
attribute_temple_detailing: No temples are visible in the images, so no detailing or embellishments can be described.
